data.body: ATTESTATION (operator-attested AC: 'make lint && make typecheck && make test green; landed through Gerrit'): Landed through Gerrit as change 761 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/761), submitted and MERGED to main as commit 8ce0cf8ef0. CI Verified +1 (GitHub Actions: build/test/lint/typecheck green) AND LLM-Review +1 both cast by the bots; 0 unresolved comments. Submitted 2026-07-17 by RebarBotNava (Contributor). Local pre-flight also green: make lint, make typecheck, 11 targeted unit tests, module-size gate.
